subject: Young dark-skinned boy in a fighting stance, wearing a training top, fists raised, determined expression, rocky background
description: A young boy with dark skin stands in an aggressive fighting stance with fists raised. The figure wears what appears to be a simple training top or vest. The expression is fierce and determined. The background features broken rocky terrain or stone debris, suggesting an outdoor training or battle environment. Energy or dust effects swirl around the figure. The composition is a mid-shot from roughly the thighs up, centered on the figure's combative posture and expression.
foreground: young dark-skinned boy in fighting stance, fists raised, determined expression
background: rocky terrain, stone debris, dust or energy swirling
emotion: fierce, determined, barely-contained power — fists-raised ready stance
